parameters.text:
🔄 Fetching latest events from IUT website...
Please wait a moment.
⛔ Unauthorized. Only the admin can trigger this command.

={{ '✅ Done! Fetched ' + $('Parse IUT Events').all().length + ' events from IUT website and updated Supabase.

📋 Latest events:
' + $('Parse IUT Events').all().slice(0, 5).map((e, i) => '  ' + (i+1) + '. ' + e.json.title + (e.json.start_time ? ' (' + new Date(e.json.start_time).toLocaleDateString('en-IN', {day: 'numeric', month: 'short', year: 'numeric'}) + ')' : '')).join('
') }}

❌ No events could be extracted from the IUT website.

The page structure may have changed. Please check https://iutripura.edu.in/eventspage manually.
